title: portulaca kuriensis
intro: Portulaca kuriensis, also known as Korean purslane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It is traditionally used in various forms of herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, Portulaca kuriensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
